label: 3 Cohens Sextet: Anat, Avishai, and Yuval

quotes.speaker: Anat Cohen
quotes.text: they like something, they are into it and they are dedicated to it and they’re like okay we step out of the way, even if we have worries about how you’re going to survive and what’s going to happen, we’re going to let you do what you’re want to do and support you and help you pay for music lessons and drive you around and drive you around and drive you around, and go to all your youth orchestra concerts and, you know they were there when we were squeaking and they were there when The Three Cohens, with the three of us have a sextet and Avishai my younger brother the trumpet player, and Yuval, my older brother, the saxophone player, we have a sextet and when The Three Cohens Sextet played Carnegie Hall my mother was sitting in the audience and you know, and we introduced her and she got up and she was like doing the royal wave to everybody. So that’s the payment they get.
quotes.caption: The Three Cohens Sextet's Carnegie Hall debut with mother in audience
quotes.doc_title: Anat Cohen interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, September 9, 2021
